name: Performapal Sky Magician Girl
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＥＭ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エンタメイト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>スカイ・マジシャン・ガール
desc: If you control a Continuous Spell: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is Special Summoned from the hand: You can send 1 Level 4 or lower LIGHT Spellcaster monster from your Deck to the GY. If this face-up card leaves the field: You can target 1 Spell/Trap on the field; destroy it. You can only use each effect of "Performapal Sky Magician Girl" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If you control a Continuous Spell: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is Special Summoned from the hand: You can send 1 Level 4 or lower LIGHT Spellcaster monster from your Deck to the GY. If this face-up card leaves the field: You can target 1 Spell/Trap on the field; destroy it. You can only use each effect of "Performapal Sky Magician Girl" once per turn.

action: Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
Activates if it leaves the field
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
